title: What is Kotlin?
description: Discover why Kotlin is the go-to language for modern apps.

slides.title: Meet Kotlin 👋
slides.content:
# What is Kotlin?

Kotlin is a modern, trendy programming language created by JetBrains. It is officially supported by Google for developing **Android apps**! 📱

But it's not just for phones; you can build backend servers, websites, and even desktop apps with it. It's truly versatile.

slides.title: Why Kotlin? 🤔
slides.content:
## The Developer's Favorite

Kotlin was designed to make developers happy. It's concise (requires less typing), very expressive, and extremely safe. 

It takes all the good parts of older languages like Java and fixes their most annoying problems.

quizData.question: Which tech giant officially supports Kotlin for Android development?
quizData.explanation: Google officially announced Kotlin as their preferred language for Android app development.

slides.title: Interoperability 🤝
slides.content:
## Plays nicely with Java

One of Kotlin's superpowers is **100% interoperability** with Java. This means you can use existing Java code in a Kotlin project, and vice versa!

If you have a massive older app written in Java, you can slowly add Kotlin to it without breaking anything.

quizData.question: Kotlin is 100% interoperable with which other popular programming language?
quizData.explanation: Kotlin is 100% interoperable with Java, allowing them to work side-by-side seamlessly.
